entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY THIS MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE LOWER 60S IN THE AFTERNOON
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH, BECOMING WEST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
COOLER WITH LOWS AROUND 40
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS AROUND 60
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
HIGHS IN THE MID 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
